column1: Xavier Edwards leads the slate with a strong combination of top-of-the-order placement, platoon advantage, and a steady track record of hitting safely in nearly 80% of games. Yandy Diaz offers similar reliability and is swinging a hot bat lately, making him another strong option. Luis Arraez brings his usual consistency at home, while Julio Rodriguez and Aaron Judge round out the group with favorable matchups but slightly less dependable recent form.
